commit_scope: Carry recipe-choice-runtime receipts into the host recipe-library viewer

commands: coord claim recipe-choice-callers "carry recipe-choice-runtime wrapper into real caller surface after PR #2998; avoid dynamic-choice and learning-fabric sibling lanes"
python3 scripts/view_recipe_library.py --recipe cosine --tongue form --choice-receipt | python3 -m json.tool

python3 scripts/view_recipe_library.py --recipe cosine --tongue form --choice-receipt >/tmp/view-recipe-choice-receipt.json && python3 -m json.tool /tmp/view-recipe-choice-receipt.json >/tmp/view-recipe-choice-receipt.pretty && rg -n "form-recipe-route-choice-runtime|form-recipe-choice-signature|bml-route-choice-runtime-signature|tree-render:form" /tmp/view-recipe-choice-receipt.pretty

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/bml-source.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/bml-route-choice-runtime.fk form-stdlib/channel-protocol-choice-floor.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-protocol-choice-floor-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m ruff check ../scripts/view_recipe_library.py tests/test_view_recipe_library_choice.py
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
